text:
互いに研鑽を積める関係性であれば
非常に理想的だと言えよう。

今回、頼みたいのは
白ノ領域での探索だ。

高低差を利用して戦うエリアとなれば
今までのようにはいかないはずだ。

様々な状況を意識しつつ
特訓も兼ねて、探索

I believe a relationship built on a common goal
is exceedingly ideal, yes?

This time, I ask that you explore the Daybreak
Province.

However, we must adjust our strategy if we
are to fight using the differences in elevation.

Will you accompany me on an expedition?
It will also incorporate a training regimen
on awareness of your environment.
